author: Jure Sotošek
subject: docs(guide): Highlighted package (algolia/react-instantsearch#1559)
body: Fixes an inconsistency between the [React guide](https://community.algolia.com/react-instantsearch/Getting_started.html#install-react-instantsearch), where the "react-instantsearch" is highlighted and the [React-Native guide](https://community.algolia.com/react-instantsearch/Getting_started_React_native.html#install-react-instantsearch-native) where it is not.
